description_long: This is a Samsung computer monitor with a sleek, rectangular display framed by a thin, black bezel. The front features a widescreen panel with a glossy finish, displaying the Windows operating system interface. The monitor is supported by a T-shaped pedestal stand, which is sturdy and minimalistic, made of black plastic with a matte texture. The rear panel is also black, with a central mounting area and a visible Samsung logo. The monitor's profile is slim, emphasizing its modern design, and the stand is attached at the center of the back. No ports or buttons are visible from the provided views, and the overall construction suggests a lightweight yet robust build.
description: A slim, black Samsung computer monitor with a thin bezel and a T-shaped pedestal stand, featuring a glossy widescreen display and a minimalist rear panel.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the Samsung logo, central mounting area, and the T-shaped stand attachment.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the monitor's slim depth and the vertical alignment of the stand.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the widescreen panel, thin bezel, and the T-shaped stand base beneath the screen.
description_view_3: Right side profile emphasizing the monitor's thinness and the stand's rear attachment.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is thin, black, and has a sleek, modern appearance with straight edges and no visible texture or decorative elements. It frames the display area with minimal thickness and has slightly rounded corners.
attribute_stand_type: T-shaped pedestal stand made of black plastic with a flat, horizontal base and a vertical support column attached centrally to the rear of the monitor. The design is minimalistic and does not show visible adjustability features.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on the front, sides, or rear in the provided images.
attribute_brand_logo: A Samsung logo is visible on the rear panel, centered near the top, and also on the front bezel below the screen, both in a subtle, light-colored font.
